sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Character Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Will can transform into two additional forms: Freedan (dark knight with sword, longer reach, more damage) and Shadow (solid energy manifestation, highest damage output). Each form has unique combat and traversal abilities.

special_mechanics.name: Form-Specific Traversal
special_mechanics.description: Certain areas are inaccessible without a specific character form. Characters acquire new techniques as part of story progression that unlock new areas.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Available source (Wikipedia) contains gameplay mechanics, character abilities, and narrative information but no quantitative physics parameters, velocity values, acceleration data, or sub-pixel system specifications. Movement and physics data would require ROM analysis or developer documentation not present in provided sources.
